title: Archive accepted SpecSync backlog (31 changes), bump specsync pin to 5.2.0, add post-merge archive rule to AGENTS.md (issue 74)
description: Archive accepted SpecSync backlog (31 changes), bump specsync pin to 5.2.0, add post-merge archive rule to AGENTS.md (issue 74)
no_spec_change_rationale: Bookkeeping archive of merged changes plus toolchain pin bump and agent rule; no module API or requirement deltas.
acceptance_criteria: .specsync/changes/ holds no accepted merged changes; all 31 backlog changes live under .specsync/archive/changes/ with date prefixes; specsync pin is 5.2.0 across .specsync/version, trust.yml, and README; AGENTS.md standing rules include the post-merge archive step; specsync change check --strict and fledge lanes run verify pass
